meta.title: Resell at Market Price
meta.description: Get a market-based valuation and a clear, guided resell process.

title: Kyaw Kyar Buy-Back Guarantee
description: We stand by the vehicles we sell. As a Kyaw Kyar customer, enjoy the peace of mind that comes with a guaranteed market-value buy-back option, ensuring your investment is always protected throughout your ownership journey.

micro.market: Based on listings, demand and car condition.

note.title: Market price guidance
note.desc: We'll guide you step by step.

hero_card.title: Clear • Fair • Fast
hero_card.desc: Get a market-based price suggestion, then continue to Sell Car to submit your details.

how_steps.step1: Submit your car details and photos
how_steps.step2: We check the market and car condition
how_steps.step3: We contact you with a suggested market price

01.title: Submit details
01.description: Share your car details and photos so we can understand your car clearly.

02.title: Market review
02.description: We review current market listings, demand, and your car condition to estimate a fair price.

03.title: Discuss at our showroom
03.description: To help you list your car in our showroom at the market price, our Kyaw Kyar Showroom team is available to discuss the details with customers at any time.

section.title: Premium resell experience
section.desc: We focus on clarity and fairness so you can resell with confidence.

market_based.title: Market-based valuation
market_based.desc: We review current market listings and demand to suggest a fair resell price.

fast_response.title: Fast response
fast_response.desc: Receive a suggested price and next steps soon after you submit your details.

trusted_process.title: Trusted process
trusted_process.desc: Transparent steps with paperwork guidance and secure communication.

cta_card.title: Ready to submit your car details?
cta_card.desc: Continue to the Sell Car page to upload photos and send your information.

marketData.title: Current Market Valuation
marketData.desc: We provide a valuation based on today's accurate market prices, ensuring you receive a transparent and fair offer.

physicalAppraisal.title: Physical Appraisal
physicalAppraisal.desc: Our experienced team performs a comprehensive review of your vehicle, leveraging our deep knowledge of car specifications to determine a fair, accurate valuation.

serviceHistory.title: Service History Premium
serviceHistory.desc: Our experienced team performs a comprehensive review of your vehicle, leveraging our deep knowledge of car specifications to determine a fair, accurate valuation.

originalPurchase.title: Kyaw Kyar Provenance
originalPurchase.desc: This benefit is exclusive to vehicles originally purchased from Kyaw Kyar Showrooms.

maintenanceRecords.title: Vserified Ownership
maintenanceRecords.desc: We require clear documentation to confirm the vehicle’s ownership history from its initial purchase at our showroom.

legalClearance.title: Legal Clearance
legalClearance.desc: All registration and ownership documents must be clear and up-to-date.

q1.question: How long does the appraisal take?
q1.answer: Usually within 24–48 hours. We work quickly to give you a price suggestion as soon as possible.

q2.question: Do I have to buy another car from you?
q2.answer: No, this is a standalone buy-back guarantee for your convenience. You can sell without purchasing.

q3.question: What if my car has minor damage?
q3.answer: We still offer buy-backs! We simply adjust the market value based on necessary repairs.
